UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: Custom metadata and profile details for registered users.

email.description: Email address of the authenticated user.

username.description: A unique custom bio-tech username handle.

avatarColor.description: A hexadecimal color used to style the user's avatar.

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the account profile was established.

AuthorizedUser.title: AuthorizedUser
AuthorizedUser.description: Whitelist record governing user access and expiry dates.

role.description: The system role level defining administrative or simple user permissions.

access_granted_at.description: Timestamp indicating when access was initially granted.

access_expires_at.description: Timestamp indicating when access rights expire.

/users/{userId}.description: User profiles database matching registered Firebase Authentication accounts.

/authorized_users/{userEmail}.description: Table for registered and prospective emails authorized to login under specific temporal conditions.
